summary: Iteration 59: Dashboard Widgets & Draggable Layout - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 tests passed for new endpoints (/api/dashboard/sales-analytics with 6 periods, /api/dashboard/accounts-payable). Frontend: Owner dashboard displays all new widgets (Sales Trends with area chart & period selector, Accounts Payable with overdue/due-this-week/upcoming breakdown, Branch Comparison bar chart), react-grid-layout working with 7 drag handles, Reset Layout and Refresh buttons functional.

BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_01_sales_analytics_this_month: PASS - Returns daily totals, branch breakdown, summary
BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_07_sales_analytics_daily_data_struc: PASS - date, revenue, cash, digital, credit, count
BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_02_accounts_payable_overdue_structu: PASS - po_id, po_number, vendor, balance, due_date, days_left
BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_01_dashboard_stats_still_works: PASS - No regression on existing endpoint

FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.kpi_cards: PASS - Total Sales Today, Cash Position, Outstanding AR, Low Stock, Audit Health
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.period_selector_interaction: PASS - Dropdown opens, 'Last Month' selectable, data updates
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.refresh_button: PASS - Button functional with loading state
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.drag_handles: PASS - 7 drag handles found (sales-trends, ap, branch-comparison, pending-reviews, payables, alerts, top-revenue)
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.branch_cards: PASS - 36 branch cards displayed in 'Branch Performance Today' section

critical_code_review_comments: Backend PERIOD_MAP correctly calculates date ranges for this_month, last_month, quarters, years
MongoDB aggregation pipeline in sales-analytics properly handles split_cash and split_digital amounts
accounts-payable correctly filters POs with payment_status not in (paid, voided) and po_type in (terms, credit)
Frontend uses react-grid-layout v2 with useContainerWidth hook (not deprecated WidthProvider)
Layout persistence via localStorage with key pattern agribooks_dashboard_layout_{userId}_{owner|branch}
All interactive widgets have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing production data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified the major dashboard redesign with react-grid-layout. The owner dashboard now has draggable widgets including Sales Trends (area chart with period selector), Accounts Payable (overdue/due-this-week/upcoming breakdown), Branch Comparison (bar chart), plus existing widgets. The grid uses 7 drag handles, KPIs and branch cards are static. Layout persists per-user in localStorage. Backend endpoints /api/dashboard/sales-analytics and /api/dashboard/accounts-payable are fully functional with all period options and proper data aggregation.
